data.content:
Implementation plan:
1) Remove Scenes screen entry points from navigation/state handling:
- Update src/components/app-header.tsx to remove the existing beads view mode, the Scenes tab button, and view-cycling references to existing.
- Update explanatory comments/tooltips that currently mention Scenes as a screen.
2) Remove Scenes screen rendering path from page composition:
- Update src/app/beads/page.tsx to remove existing from the view union/parser, remove ExistingOrchestrationsView import/use, and keep all other views intact.
- Ensure unknown or legacy view query values now fall back to list view.
3) Remove orphaned Scenes screen source/tests once no longer referenced:
- Delete src/components/existing-orchestrations-view.tsx and src/lib/__tests__/existing-orchestrations-view.test.ts if they become unreachable from app UI.
4) Settings/UI mention audit:
- Verify settings/navigation surfaces no longer reference a dedicated Scenes screen/tab.
- Keep internal scene orchestration behavior unless directly tied to the removed screen to avoid broad regressions.
5) Validation strategy:
- Run bun install --frozen-lockfile in the implementation worktree before checks.
- Run quality gates: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
- If full test suite duration is excessive, at minimum run targeted tests around touched files and report any skipped gates explicitly.

Complexity/Risks:
- Moderate UI wiring change with low backend risk.
- Main risk is leaving stale imports/types/query handling that break compile or keyboard view cycling.
- Secondary risk is removing tests/components that are still transitively referenced.
